title: Artifact Verification Core Rubric
criteria: The command or workflow ran successfully.
The output is specific and grounded in real evidence.
The learner followed the safety constraints.
The deliverable is complete enough to review.

title: Capstone Evidence Rubric
criteria: The project solves a real bounded problem.
The architecture is explained in plain English.
The demo evidence is credible and complete.
The safety and review choices are documented.

title: Runtime Validation Rubric
criteria: The runtime choice is justified with support-tier and beginner-fit reasoning.
The validation steps are concrete and reproducible.
The learner captured evidence from startup or first-response checks.
The learner documented at least one safety or rollback consideration.
